_comment: Hand-extracted KG supplement for Lens C (C12 run, 2026-06-21). The nightly graphify build (4157n/77335e) is from the 83-behind working tree and returns 0 node hits for the three new P6 'grounded Ask MIRA' symbols, while resolving the pre-existing extra_context builders (_build_kg_context, _build_live_data_context, check_citation_compliance = 1 hit each). These nodes/edges are extracted from origin/main deploy-truth bytes (commit 4c1cf00c) so the new engine-grounding sibling is graph-representable. Edge type 'reads_with_predicate' flags the proposed/verified data dependency that carries the C12-1 finding.
extracted_from: origin/main@f6a9bec2 (4c1cf00c feat(contextualization): P6 grounded Ask MIRA)

nodes.label: Supervisor._build_ctx_signals_context()
nodes.note: flag-gated (MIRA_CTX_SIGNALS_ENABLED, default 0); runs in answer path after asset_identified — NOT a gate bypass

nodes.label: Supervisor._format_ctx_signals()
nodes.note: renders '--- APPROVED PLC SIGNALS ---' block; renders confidence but NOT approval_state — C12-1

nodes.label: fetch_ctx_approved_signals()
nodes.note: tenant-scoped (%s::uuid) + parameterized; queries approval_state IN ('proposed','verified') — C12-1

edges.evidence: ctx_enrichment.py:38 approval_state IN ('proposed','verified') — proposed rows reach the 'APPROVED PLC SIGNALS' prompt block (C12-1)

insight: The new P6 grounding sibling (_build_ctx_signals_context -> fetch_ctx_approved_signals -> kg_entities) parallels the graph-visible _build_kg_context / _build_live_data_context / check_citation_compliance builders, but all three new symbols are 0-hit in the nightly graph. The defect-carrying edge is fetch_ctx_approved_signals --reads_with_predicate('proposed','verified')--> kg_entities: it pulls UNVERIFIED rows into a block labeled 'APPROVED PLC SIGNALS'. Same present-target/missing-newest fingerprint A10/B11/E10/F11/A13/B12 keep hitting — the graph sees the grounding builders already proven sound and is blind to the one carrying the finding.
